result.finding: validation/longchain_complete.py vs Yamazaki: with the LC6 root-matching carrier the complete recipe reproduces the long-chain ROOT at log10 RMSE 0.002 (by construction the carrier is fit to root, confirming the active carrier CAN lift the long-chain root). Per congener -- PFOA(C8) carrier 1.2x root 0.5/0.5 straw 1.8/0.8 grain 0.7/0.5; PFNA(C9) carrier 1.3x root 0.6/0.6 straw 1.5/0.7 grain 0.6/0.4; PFDA(C10) carrier 1.2x root 4.2/4.2 straw 5.9/3.5 grain 4.9/3.4; PFUnDA(C11) carrier 2.0x root 19.6/19.5 straw 26.7/8.2 grain 7.2/3.1; PFDoDA(C12) carrier 5.5x root 68.9/69.3 straw 113.1/49.7 grain 51.2/45.5.
